attributes.description: Alerts when any Redis Enterprise certificate expires within 30 days. Expired certs break intra-cluster and client TLS.
attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] TLS certificate expiring soon

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis Enterprise TLS certificate expiring soon

### What fired
Node certificate expiration less than 30 days.

### Why it matters
Redis Enterprise uses certificates for intra-cluster mesh and client TLS. Expiration causes silent cluster partitioning and client handshake failures.

### Triage
1. Identify which certificate path is expiring.
2. Check the certificate rotation tooling.

### Remediation
- Renew the cert via `rladmin` or the management UI.
- Restart services if required.

### Tuning
- 30 days lead time; consider a 60-day warning.
